personal.name: Saib Hossain
personal.objective: Motivated and detail-oriented Computer Science student with hands-on experience in Natural Language Processing (NLP), Transformer-based architectures, and fine-tuning large language models (LLMs). Proficient in applying machine learning and deep learning techniques to solve real-world problems, with a strong interest in advancing AI research. Seeking a Research Assistant role where I can contribute to optimizing NLP models, developing high-quality datasets, and supporting cutting-edge research initiatives. Passionate about continuous learning, collaboration, and driving meaningful innovation in artificial intelligence.

research_experience.title: Project: Correlation search between 'radiomic features' and lung tumors: stage, therapeutic success, survival time.
details: Developed deep learning pipelines for medical image analysis.
Extracted and analyzed radiomic features; supported model evaluation and statistical correlation studies.
Documented experiments and findings of model reliability, data bias, and clinical applicability, relevant to healthcare AI governance.

research_experience.title: Generative AI & Computer Vision
details: Designed a synthetic face generation pipeline with StyleGAN2 and Stable Diffusion XL (SDXL) to address data scarcity in vision research.
Fine-tuned diffusion models using LoRA for identity preservation and controlled diversity.
Applied Adaptive Discriminator Augmentation (ADA) to mitigate overfitting with small datasets.
Conducted error analysis and quality evaluation to improve generative consistency and realism.

research_experience.title: AI Safety & Alignment Research
details: Contributing to the Engineering & Research Division, focusing on the theoretical underpinnings of safe Artificial Intelligence systems.
Conducting critical literature reviews and drafting research briefs to support exploratory research into advanced model capabilities and alignment.
Synthesizing complex technical papers into actionable insights for ongoing R&D projects.

projects.title: Agentic AI Technical Interviewer
projects.description: Engineered a stateful, non-linear AI interviewing agent that autonomously parses candidate CVs, generates customized technical agendas, and conducts dynamic conversational interviews.
details: Model: Designed a robust state machine using LangGraph to manage complex conversation loops, including intent routing (clarification vs. evaluation) and dynamic follow-up generation.
Tech Stack: LangGraph, LangChain, Pydantic, PyPDFLoader, Streamlit.
Key Features: PDF text extraction and chunking, multi-LLM support (Cloud/Gemini + Local/Ollama), structured JSON output validation for strict grading, and context-aware session memory.

Outcome: Delivered a highly scalable interview simulator that successfully mimics human conversational nuances, providing candidates with real-time feedback and recruiters with standardized technical evaluations.

projects.title: MedAssist-LLM-iPhone (Offline Medical QA LLM)
projects.description: Fine-tuned a lightweight Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct Large Language Model on a medical Question-Answering dataset and optimized it for fully offline inference on iPhone devices.
details: Model: Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct fine-tuned with LoRA for medical question answering.
Tech Stack: Python, Unsloth, Hugging Face Transformers, LoRA, GGUF, llama.cpp, PocketPal.
Key Features: Model quantization for mobile inference, fully offline deployment pipeline, privacy-preserving medical QA without cloud dependency.
Outcome: Achieved efficient on-device LLM inference on iPhone with optimized memory usage and fast response times.

projects.title: Real-Time Vision + LLM Agent (LLM with Eyes)
projects.description: Developed an autonomous vision agent that integrates real-time object detection with LLM reasoning to understand visual environments.
details: Model: YOLO11 for object detection combined with Gemini 2.5 Flash LLM for contextual reasoning.
Tech Stack: Python, YOLO11, Gemini API, Computer Vision.
Key Features: Real-time camera stream processing, object segmentation and detection, LLM-based contextual interpretation.
Outcome: Created an intelligent vision pipeline where detected objects are analyzed by an LLM for higher-level understanding.

projects.title: Synthetic Face Dataset Generation (GANs + Diffusion)
projects.description: Built a hybrid generative pipeline combining GANs and diffusion models to study dataset effects on synthetic face generation.
details: Model: StyleGAN2-ADA for generative modeling and SDXL diffusion for dataset augmentation.
Tech Stack: Python, PyTorch, GANs, Diffusion Models, LoRA Fine-tuning.
Key Features: Hybrid generation pipeline, LoRA fine-tuning for identity control, dataset engineering for small-data scenarios.
Outcome: Produced high-quality synthetic face datasets suitable for controlled vision experiments and model training.

projects.title: LangGraph MCP Agent with XAMPP Database Integration
projects.description: Developed a modular LangGraph-powered MCP server integrated with XAMPP MySQL for intelligent document management and AI-driven query workflows.
details: Architecture: LangGraph multi-agent workflow with MCP server for tool orchestration.
Tech Stack: Python 3.12, LangGraph, FastAPI, MCP Server, MySQL (XAMPP), Uvicorn.
Key Features: File upload pipeline, metadata indexing, AI-driven database queries, scalable modular architecture.
Outcome: Built an extendable system suitable for multi-agent AI applications interacting with structured databases.

projects.title: Bangla Sign Language Translator
projects.description: Developed a vision-based Bangla sign language recognition system that translates hand gestures into Bangla alphabets and spoken words.
details: Model: CNN-based sign recognition trained using MediaPipe hand landmark features.
Tech Stack: PyTorch, MediaPipe, Streamlit, gTTS, ESP32, Raspberry Pi.
Key Features: Real-time gesture detection, Bangla alphabet prediction, speech output using text-to-speech.
Outcome: Enabled assistive communication technology for Bangla sign language users.

projects.title: Googler Search Agent
projects.description: Built an autonomous AI search agent that retrieves web results and generates concise summaries using local LLMs.
details: Model: Local LLMs running via Ollama with LangGraph workflow orchestration.
Tech Stack: Python, LangGraph, Ollama, DuckDuckGo Search API, Web Automation.
Key Features: Autonomous query execution, result retrieval, summarization pipeline.
Outcome: Created an offline-friendly research assistant capable of automated web information synthesis.

projects.title: Prompt-Based Dynamic LLM Selector
projects.description: Developed a dynamic routing system that intelligently selects the most suitable locally hosted LLM based on prompt complexity.
details: Model: Gemma3:1B, Gemma3n:4B, DeepSeek-R1:1.5B deployed locally via Ollama.
Tech Stack: Python, Ollama, Local LLM orchestration.
Key Features: Prompt analysis and routing, multi-model orchestration, optimized resource utilization.
Outcome: Achieved efficient multi-model inference by balancing accuracy and computational cost.

projects.title: DeepLearning-with-PyTorch
projects.description: Implemented deep learning models for image classification using convolutional neural networks.
details: Model: CNN architectures trained on MNIST and FashionMNIST datasets.
Tech Stack: Python, PyTorch, Google Colab.
Key Features: Neural network training pipelines, optimization experiments, model evaluation.
Outcome: Demonstrated foundational deep learning techniques for computer vision tasks.

projects.title: AI-Based Plagiarism Detection
projects.description: Implemented a lightweight system to detect AI-generated text using local language models and NLP classification techniques.
details: Model: On-device LLM-based text classification.
Tech Stack: Python, NLP, Local LLM inference.
Key Features: AI-generated text detection, document analysis pipeline.
Outcome: Built a privacy-preserving plagiarism detection tool capable of operating without cloud services.

projects.title: AI-Powered Study Assistant Chatbot
projects.description: Developed an educational chatbot using GPT-2 to assist students with study-related questions.
details: Model: GPT-2 fine-tuned for educational conversational tasks.
Tech Stack: Python, FastAPI, JavaScript, HTML/CSS.
Key Features: REST API backend, interactive web interface, conversational learning support.
Outcome: Built a full-stack AI chatbot capable of providing academic assistance.

certifications.skills: Neural Networks, Deep Learning, ML Pipelines, Deployment

certifications.description: Built a strong foundation in data analysis using spreadsheets, SQL, R, and visualization tools like Tableau.

certifications.title: IBM Data Science Fundamentals
certifications.description: Learned the basics of data science, Python programming, and data analysis using tools like Jupyter, Pandas, and Numpy.
certifications.skills: Python, Data Science Workflow, Pandas, Data Wrangling

certifications.title: Financial Markets – Yale University
certifications.description: Developed foundational understanding of financial markets, investment strategies, risk management, and behavioral finance.
certifications.skills: Financial Literacy, Market Dynamics, Risk Analysis, Economic Behavior

certifications.title: Transformer Models and BERT
certifications.description: Gained practical knowledge of transformer architecture and BERT. Focused on attention mechanisms, fine-tuning for NLP tasks, and working with Hugging Face.
certifications.skills: Transformers, BERT, Hugging Face, PyTorch, NLP, Fine-tuning

details: Contributed to the development of autonomous navigation systems using Python and Robot Operating System (ROS) for Mars rover prototypes.
Implemented sensor fusion with LiDAR, IMU, and camera modules to enhance localization and decision-making.
Utilized tools including Gazebo, Rviz, OpenCV, and techniques such as SLAM and PID control to ensure robust performance in real-world simulations.
NCTF works for child rights and protection in Bangladesh, supported by Save the Children, Plan International, and Bangladesh Shishu Academy.
